infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: WayTale uses your location to find nearby landmarks and trigger audio narration as you travel.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: WayTale uses your location in the background to narrate landmarks during an active tour.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Not required — WayTale only plays audio, it does not record.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: WayTale uses your location to find nearby landmarks and play narration during tours.
